attributes.accessibilityText: Done yet? Keeps tasks active and keeps asking until they are completed. Quick add Choose the task behavior first, then decide which list it belongs to. Write a new task  Reminder With reminders Reminders are scheduled and will nudge you again.  To-Do No reminders To-Do tasks stay simple and do not send notifications. List selection Which list should this task belong to? Focus Home Health You can long-press and drag lists to reorder them on the home screen. Continue Active Today Overdue Active tasks Tasks that are currently open. Tap a card to view details.  Snooze  Done Follow up on the quarterly review  Snooze  Done Pay rent  Snooze  Done Wrap up the product polish list  Snooze  Done Water the plants  Snooze  Done Go to the evening workout  Snooze  Done Prep lunch for tomorrow  Snooze  Done Plan next week priorities  Done Buy fresh fruit Lists Add list You can long-press and drag lists to reorder them on the home screen. error.debugMessage:
Could not find a visible element matching selector: "Add list"
Tip: Try adjusting the following settings to improve detection:
- `timeout`: current = 10000ms → Increase if you need more time to find the element
- `speed`: current = 40 (0-100 scale) → Increase for faster scrolling if element is far away
- `waitToSettleTimeoutMs`: current = Not defined → Set this value (e.g., 500ms) if your UI updates frequently between scrolls
- `visibilityPercentage`: current = 60% → Lower this value if you want to detect partially visible elements
- `centerElement`: current = true → Disable if you don't need the element to be centered after finding it

tapOnElement.label: Confirm the seed deep link if iOS asks for it
Confirm the seed deep link if iOS asks for it
